entry.title: New: RES26-070 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ONE (1) HIGH-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ “DONATED BY MCARDLE, RUSSELL, SOLOMON, BAGINSKI OHANA,” VALUED AT $4,274.51 FROM ELIZABETH MCARDLE SOLOMON TO BE PLACED AT KAILUA BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
